title: metalasia albescens
intro: Metalasia albescens, also known as the white metalis, is a flowering plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to South Africa. Its medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Metalasia albescens include the potential relief of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. In herbal preparations, Metalasia albescens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
